response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills with 10+ years of experience across multiple languages and domains, including embedded systems work in C/C++. However, there is no clear evidence of expertise in security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), Linux kernel modification, or embedded networking—key requirements for this role. Native-level Japanese proficiency is also unverified.
strengths: Extensive experience with C/C++ and embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly (multiple languages/frameworks)
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption)
No mention of Linux kernel modification or embedded networking expertise
